title: ActiveProbe
description: Defines an empirical test or micro-action an agent executes to gather real-time data about an environment or peer.

target.description: The Agent ID, Service, or Resource being probed.

probe_type.description: The nature of the probe being executed.

execution_parameters.description: Specific parameters required to execute the probe.

expected_outcome.description: The baseline assumption prior to probing.

epistemic_update.description: How the probe's result should update the agent's internal belief state.

on_success.description: Belief update if the outcome matches expectations.

on_failure.description: Belief update if the outcome deviates or fails.

confidence_delta.description: How much to adjust belief confidence based on this probe.
